branches.label: Public
branches.description: Downloads the newest public Koil jar from Modrinth.

branches.label: .unfinished
branches.description: Downloads unfinished beta jars from GitHub.

branches.label: .frequent
branches.description: Downloads frequent beta jars from GitHub.

sections.title: Removed projects bundled systems from Koil
items: Removed Analiea entrypoints and classes from Koil.
Removed Ignite entrypoints and classes from Koil.
Removed Koro from Koil.

sections.title: Improved the Update system
items: Improved the Koil update screen and structured update data model for branches, releases, files, sections, and update types.
Added update state tracking and download result handling for Koil update flows.
Added typed Koil update toasts so update messages can use the correct toast category and style.
Added update type structure so unfinished beta builds can be listed with their own branch and jar file.

sections.title: Config and design editing
items: Added the Koil config screen with grouped entries, color groups, sliders, ranges, paths, registry IDs, keybind entries, tri-state options, size entries, sound config entries, and section inspector data.
Added mod config discovery and config document handling for detected mod config files.
Expanded uiColorVal and DesignLoader so more Koil UI colors and design values can come from config/design data.

sections.title: Content browser and Modrinth screens
items: Added a shared foundation with search, view modes, sort modes, group modes, filter menus, and install choices.
Added a reusable content browser list entries, group headers, item rows, preview chips, tooltip regions, preview sections, preview render state, and remote icon resolving.
Updated mod, resource pack, data pack, and pack screen code to use the newer content preview and screen design systems.
Expanded the multiplayer screen with Modrinth server search/list support and server-compatible content browsing.

sections.title: F3 redesign and debug tools
items: Added the redesigned Koil F3 overlay renderer with graph cards, chart models, pie slices, debug panels, target inspection, and projected points.
Added F3 data APIs for snapshots, sections, target snapshots, target types, layout state, refresh speed, modes, reports, and command bridge support.
Added visual debug systems for ghost terrain fields, terrain columns, chunk-style debug rendering, behavior dots, axis projection, graph signals, and jump preview state.
Added debug accessors and input/render mixins for F3 mouse interaction, debug HUD access, in-game HUD access, entity rendering, and hiding/replacing debug overlay behavior.

sections.title: Performance optimizer
items: Added the Koil Performance Optimizer screen with chart kinds, diagnostics panes, recommendation hitboxes, and session state.
Added performance APIs for hardware scanning, hardware class advice, live monitoring, benchmark runs, optimization testing, reports, runtime context, recommendations, and performance snapshots.
Added performance profile and provider systems for vanilla settings, JSON configs, targeted JSON rules, properties files, and shaderpack config support.
Added /optimize and /stats support through Koil performance command bridge classes.

sections.title: Automation and KTL system
items: Added the new automation router, interpreter, mode controller, request model, reporter, runtime status, settings, proof suite, presence bridge, and remote run bridge systems.

Added the KTL compiler service with template metadata, compiled steps, grammar patterns, lexicon entries, semantic operation definitions, resolved targets, session memory, coordinate parsing, and direct template invocation support.

Added the automation runtime executor with active execution state, movement plans, movement progress, movement safety, candidate safety, held inputs, cached entity refs, block tracing, and runtime primitive execution support.
Added automation feedback and improvement services with feedback nodes, failure type registries, pending flows, improvement groups, and improvement summaries.

sections.title: Console and CLI interface
items: Added the Koil Console screen and scroll metrics.
Added console APIs for channels, levels, records, repositories, formatting, styled lines, styled spans, themes, command history, request bridging, and log display reads.
Added console input suggestions and registry-backed suggestion presentation.

Added automation CLI rendering with snapshots, rows, view models, HUD blocks, state colors, chat HUD actions, and a canvas renderer for automation nodes, links, frames, hover cues, terminal state, and brain stats.

sections.title: File editor, package tools, and media previews
items: Expanded the Koil file explorer and editor with editor document state, cursor positions, selection ranges, improved syntax color types, and larger editor/file explorer render systems.
Added a Koil package builder screen with tree row rendering.
Expanded Koil package manager handling for package operations and file workflows.

Added media preview support for managed frame textures, image decoding, image texture caching, GIF playback, PCM audio playback, FFmpeg video probing/playback, video thumbnails, poster cache, unsupported video fallback, and visual playback state.

sections.title: Mixin and access changes
items: Added new mixins for in-game HUD rendering, text field widgets, tab navigation, Realms main screen, edit game rules screen, experiments screen, world entry access, F3 mouse input, and entity rendering.
Removed old Analiea, Ignite, and other client player interaction, client play network handler, game renderer, and Ignite render mixins from the active mixin list and Koil.
Expanded the access widener with additional Minecraft client and living entity access needed by the new systems.
Updated the refmap to match the new redesigned UI, automation, console, debug, and F3 mixin set.

sections.title: Update and assistant systems
items: Auto Update System: automatically manages updates directly from the title screen for seamless integration.
Koro AI Assistant: built-in assistant for user engagement, suggestions, and enhanced communication.
Internet Connection Warnings: alerts for internet loss or instability during gameplay.

sections.title: File and app systems
items: Filing System: new file management system with multiple file support and an integrated File Explorer screen.
Custom JSON/Java Apps: support for creating and implementing custom utility or casual apps.

sections.title: UI and manager screens
items: Full UI Customization: added full UI color and aesthetic customization.
Fundraising Page: dedicated in-game interface for community contributions.
Dark Mode: added darker background mode for visual comfort.
Improved Options Menu: revamped for better navigation and usability.
Singleplayer Menu Fixes: resolved background rendering issues in the Singleplayer menu.

sections.title: Content downloads
items: Mod Download Section: added in-game mod downloads to the Mod Manager.
Resource Pack Download Menu: added a dedicated download menu in the Resource Pack screen.

sections.title: Manager and JSON creation fixes
items: Added many manager menu changes.
Fixed bugs in JSON creation systems.

releases.name: Koil 0.70.23 JSON Item And Block Adjustments

sections.title: J-API data systems
items: Large JSON item and block adjustment pass.

sections.title: Description:
items: Versions here and below are unarchived and have been ruined/lost. As in the tracks of the development are destroyed beyond this point...
Major point in the system where the version styleing and meaning was set.

sections.title: The begining:
items: No one remembers when Koil started development, but we know it roughly began at the end of 2022, as just a test.

changeLogBeta: 0.70.26 unfinished beta update: UI redesign, F3/debug tools, performance optimizer, automation/KTL, console, update system, content browser, config/design expansion, and legacy bundled-system cleanup.
changeLogFull: Structured public changelog entries are available in releases.
changeLogFullBeta: Structured beta and public changelog entries are available in releases.
